# KB Guide

## 附录

### Samples

This appendix explains the reference-only sample payload used for troubleshooting and API demos.

token=abcdef0123456789
payload={"mode":"sample","retry":3,"endpoint":"/api/v1/demo"}
value_a=0000000000000000000000000000000000
value_b=1111111111111111111111111111111111
value_c=2222222222222222222222222222222222
